direction: Noir editorial × brutalist grid × lime-neon accent
pointOfView: Dark magazine spread — warm off-white ink on true noir, oversized Fraunces serif that bleeds off the page, JetBrains Mono labels like print folios, one electric lime accent used surgically.

palette.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='160' height='160'><filter id='n'><feTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='2' stitchTiles='stitch'/><feColorMatrix values='0 0 0 0 0.04  0 0 0 0 0.04  0 0 0 0 0.04  0 0 0 0.35 0'/></filter><rect width='100%' height='100%' filter='url(%23n)'/></svg>")

display.usage: H1 / H2 / oversized statements — prefer weight 600-800 with optical size >=96 for display

mono.usage: Labels, section indices (01/02/03/04), metadata, nav items, folio marks — uppercase, tracked +0.18em

body.usage: Paragraph body copy only. Never headings.

layout.grid: 12-col editorial, asymmetric — content never centered as a single column
layout.hero: H1 'TOAN HO' set in Fraunces weight 800, intentionally clips the right viewport edge by ~8-12vw; left column holds mono kicker + body tagline
layout.projects: Full-width horizontal rows (editorial tiles), NOT a 3-up card grid
layout.indices: 01 / 02 / 03 / 04 — oversized serif numerals set as folios at row-start
layout.marquee: Horizontal infinite scroll strip for tag/skill band, 1px neon hairline above/below
layout.gutters: px-6 md:px-10 lg:px-16; vertical rhythm 160/240/320 px between sections
layout.nav: slim top bar, NOT fixed by default — on scroll gains backdrop-blur + 1px bottom rule

interactions.cursorSpot: radial gradient blob (480px, neon @ 6% opacity, mix-blend-mode: screen) follows pointer with lerp 0.12 — client component, desktop-only
interactions.scrollReveal: framer-motion whileInView — y:24->0, opacity:0->1, 600ms ease-out, stagger children 80ms
interactions.tileHover: row lifts -2px, index numeral switches from ink -> neon, neon 1px underline slides L->R under project name, mono meta fades in
interactions.marquee: CSS @keyframes linear 40s infinite — pause on hover
interactions.linkUnderline: active nav link: neon hairline 1px under mono label; inactive: transparent

cohesion_rule.neonBudget: Neon #C6F432 covers <5% of any viewport. Permitted: primary CTA fill, active nav underline, project index on hover, email-link underline on hover. Forbidden: neon body text, neon borders on every card, neon background blocks.
cohesion_rule.textureBudget: Grain overlay at 35% alpha, fixed to viewport, pointer-events:none, z-index:1 — never on top of body copy.
cohesion_rule.motionBudget: Max 1 persistent motion element on screen (cursor spot OR marquee, not both animating loudly).
